About Me

Results-driven engineer who ships.

I'm an AI/ML Engineer with a Master's in Computer Science from Arizona State University and 5+ years of hands-on experience building production-grade machine learning systems. I specialize in the full ML lifecycle — from data pipelines and model development to deployment, monitoring, and optimization.

At NetworkVC, I architected serverless ML pipelines on AWS that cut infrastructure costs by 40%, built real-time inference endpoints handling 10,000+ requests per second, and designed ML systems with 97% reliability. I care deeply about systems that actually work in the real world.

I'm also available for freelance projects — whether you need AI/ML engineering, MLOps consulting, or frontend development. Let's build something great.
